caption: syncsusyd 19h What if robots could see, think, and act in the real world just like humans? 🤖 Join us as Dr. William Zhi dives into Embodied AI where robots learn from humans and operate beyond controlled settings. 🧠 Learn how robots pick up skills from just a few demonstrations 🌍 Adapt to new, unpredictable environments ⚙️ And leverage foundation models to improve perception 📅 26 March (Week 5) ⏰ 6–8PM 📍 Boardroom 124, J12 (CSB) 🍕 PEP hours + free food included Perfect for anyone interested in AI, robotics, or the future of intelligent systems. #SYNCS #USYD #EmbodiedAI #Robotics
alt:
What if robots could see, think, and act in the real world just like humans? 🤖

Join us as Dr. William Zhi dives into Embodied AI where robots learn from humans and operate beyond controlled settings.

🧠 Learn how robots pick up skills from just a few demonstrations
🌍 Adapt to new, unpredictable environments
⚙️ And leverage foundation models to improve perception

📅 26 March (Week 5)
⏰ 6–8PM
📍 Boardroom 124, J12 (CSB)

🍕 PEP hours + free food included

Perfect for anyone interested in AI, robotics, or the future of intelligent systems.

#SYNCS #USYD #EmbodiedAI #Robotics

caption: 1. Be a member of both SUAMS & SYNCS (it’s free!) 2. Follow both our Instagram accounts @usydsuams @syncsusyd 3. Tag a friend in the comments That’s it. Free memberships, free entry, and you could walk away with an AirPods 4, Air Fryer or a $100 Cole’s Gift Card 🙈 What are you waiting for !?? 🔗 Links in bio to sign up to both socs. ⏰ Giveaway closes 22nd March — tag someone NOW and get them in on it.

caption: syncsusyd 2d Are you CURIOUS about our weekly events 👀 (we know you are)… Join us every WEDNESDAY & THURSDAY for: 💻 Leetcoding Club 🎲 Social Nights 🌭 Weekly BBQ 🎤 Tech Talks Here at SYNCS, we have a great mix of tech, industry and social events for YOU (yes you) to enjoy! Please feel free to drop by any of our events each week, we would love to see you there! P.S. free food is provided 😮‍💨
